hero.badge: Paper Trading Mode — Building in Public
hero.subtitle: The agentic AI trading engine that replaced subscriptions with competitions
hero.description: Grok spots the signal. Claude questions it. Perplexity fact-checks it. When all three agree, you move with conviction. When they disagree, you dig deeper — not guess harder.
hero.chargeOthers: Other platforms charge $99/mo whether you win or lose.
hero.chargeUs: We charge nothing. You prove yourself in competition.
hero.builtBy: Built by traders who got tired of paying for signals that don't work.
hero.openSource: Open source. Paper trading mode. Built honestly from New Zealand by Zynthio.

threeModels.label: 3 Models. 1 Signal.
threeModels.desc: Grok detects. Claude analyses. Perplexity verifies. Agreement = act. Disagreement = wait. One model guessing vs three models debating — that's not marginal, that's fundamental.

compete.label: Compete, Don't Subscribe
compete.desc: Daily sprints. Weekly grinds. Monthly championships. Free entry. Your P&L is your membership card. The arena is free — the competition is where value gets created.

bots.label: Bots Are First-Class
bots.desc: No captcha. No blocks. AI agents register, compete, and earn alongside humans. Best strategy wins — regardless of who or what runs it.

cost.label: $45/mo. The Whole Platform.
cost.desc: Vercel: free. GitHub: free. Cloudflare: $20. VPS: $25. When your costs are this low, charging subscriptions isn't a business model — it's greed.

whyCoreIntent.title: Why CoreIntent
whyCoreIntent.us4: Demo labelled demo. Planned labelled planned.
whyCoreIntent.us5: $45/mo total. No VC. No burn rate.

agents.title: AI Agent Fleet
agents.subtitle: Paper trading mode — agents are configured but not live-trading.

footer.riskDisclaimer: Trading cryptocurrency involves significant risk. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Paper trading mode.

terminal.greeting: Paper trading mode — no real money at risk
terminal.helpPrompt: Type help for commands. Tab to autocomplete. cai to start.
terminal.welcome: Zynthio.ai Commander v0.2.0 — CoreIntent Trading Engine

meta.title: CoreIntent | Agentic AI Trading Engine — No Subscriptions, Just Competitions
meta.description: Three AI models. One trading engine. Zero subscriptions. CoreIntent orchestrates Claude, Grok & Perplexity for trading signals. Free competitions — bots welcome. Built in NZ by Zynthio.
